summary: Backend-only regression + v2.0 Auto Risk-Based Position Sizing verification. Full pytest suite (192/192) passes with the 12 new tests in test_position_sizing_v2.py. All curl-verified end-to-end flows work: default_lots persistence across backend restart (source='user_saved'), sizing_config GET/POST round-trip, /bot/status extension with sizing_mode/risk_pct/max_lots/sim_capital/default_lots, and HTTP 400 validation on all invalid inputs (risk_pct out of (0,10], max_lots<1, sim_capital<=0, default_lots<1, sizing_mode not in {'manual','auto_risk'}). SIM vs LIVE isolation confirmed via unit tests (broker.get_net_available_cash not called in SIM; LIVE fetch-failure returns error + final_lots=0 blocking trade).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py + main.py + telegram.py touched cleanly; strategy/FSM/broker paths untouched as required.
Restart-persistence proven via live curl (backend restarted; default_lots=7 preserved).
Validation errors return concise descriptive HTTP 400 messages — good UX for frontend.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for these endpoints
seed_data_creation: None. Test sets default_lots=7 and sizing_config via curl for verification, matches examples in review request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 complete: 192/192 pytest, all v2.0 sizing endpoints verified via curl including HTTP 400 for all 6 invalid-input paths and backend-restart persistence. Frontend skipped per review_request (backend-only). Current bot_state after test: default_lots=7, sizing_mode='auto_risk', risk_pct=1.5, max_lots=8, sim_capital=300000.
